cb_layout: c0:input(2pg) c1:scaler(1pg) c16:output(2pg) c24:max(1pg) c25:exp(2pg) c26:recip(1pg)
work_distribution: dim=-1: NC*Ht tile-rows, dim=-2: NC*Wt tile-cols

description: Reader/writer passthrough with compute identity copy. Establishes full data pipeline with TensorAccessor reads/writes, scaler tile generation, and copy_tiles identity.

approach: TensorAccessor for input reads, prepare_reduce_scaler for c_1, single pass streaming Wt tiles per row (dim=0) or Ht tiles per col (dim=1)
Identity copy using copy_tiles(c_0, c_16, total_tiles). compute_kernel_hw_startup(c_0, c_1, c_16) for init. tiles_per_work_unit = Wt (dim=0) or Ht (dim=1).
TensorAccessor for output writes, per-tile streaming from c_16. dim=0: Wt tiles per row, dim=1: Ht tiles per col with strided addressing.

cb_summary: c0: reader push 1/compute pop 1 (per tile, balanced). c1: reader push 1 (scaler, unused in stage 1). c16: compute push 1/writer pop 1 (per tile, balanced).
